spells.description: A simple, inexpensive and highly effective spell for mining. Best used on a wand, allowing for another glyph slot which can be used to accelerate the projectile or expand the mined area. Testing in the Nether with an extended Scrying ritual produced over 2 stacks of ancient debris in 15 minutes, as well as several stacks of quartz ore and modded ores. Use with jar of voiding to replenish mana by deleting bulk blocks.
